signature_probe.note: Deployed app verifies the configured whsec correctly; the live endpoint signs deliveries with a different (unretrievable) secret.

blocker.summary: we_1TwCAALA5oeiO5iDBwdOFWMt signing secret differs from production STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET; cannot be reconciled from this run.
api_constraints: webhook_endpoints retrieve does not return secret
Cloudflare Pages API token is read-only (project PATCH auth error; create-deployment 403)
blocker.operator_fix: Roll we_X signing secret (or create a new endpoint), set Cloudflare Pages production STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET to the new whsec, redeploy main, then resend evt_1TwC0NLA5oeiO5iDUmzugqyy.
blocker.fail_closed: Signature verification was NOT disabled and no delivery was fabricated.

reverification_2026-07-23_iter3.note: Blocker re-confirmed with live GETs and probes this iteration; no live PaymentIntent, refund, or endpoint mutation performed.

deployed_secret_probe.method: HMAC-SHA256 over '{t}.{payload}' using the FULL 'whsec_...' string as key, current timestamp, posted to /api/webhooks/stripe
deployed_secret_probe.conclusion: Deployed STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET == the value in Cloudflare Pages production env; the app verifies correctly. It does NOT equal we_X's signing secret, so real endpoint deliveries fail (pending_webhooks stays 1).

cloudflare_write_recheck.conclusion: Token remains read-only; env var STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET cannot be updated from this run.

reverification_2026-07-23_iter3.why_unreconcilable_from_this_run: Both writable directions are closed: (a) app-side secret C cannot be changed to match the endpoint (Cloudflare token read-only), and (b) the endpoint secret cannot be set/rolled/read to match C (Stripe exposes an endpoint secret only in the create response, never on retrieve/update). No endpoint with secret==C exists (we_X is the only endpoint and its secret != C), and Stripe does not allow creating an endpoint with a chosen secret. Requires operator with Cloudflare Pages Edit or Stripe Dashboard access.

reverification_2026-07-23_run034458.note: Independent re-verification in a fresh run (new Cloudflare token, no Stripe key provisioned to the builder). Blocker re-confirmed structurally; no live charge, refund, or Stripe/endpoint mutation performed.
reverification_2026-07-23_run034458.builder_stripe_credential: ABSENT — no STRIPE_SECRET_KEY / restricted read key in the builder environment; Cloudflare Pages production secrets (STRIPE_SECRET_KEY, STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET) are write-only and cannot be read back. Per the mission fail-closed rule the builder does NOT source a key from the repo, mission text, or TESTLOG, and does NOT fabricate a delivery.

cloudflare_write_recheck.conclusion: This run's Cloudflare token is also read-only; STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET still cannot be updated from automation. The read-only status is not an artifact of one stale token.

reverification_2026-07-23_run034458.conclusion: AC6 remains blocked on one-time operator action (roll we_1TwCAALA5oeiO5iDBwdOFWMt's signing secret or create a fresh endpoint in the Stripe Dashboard, set Cloudflare Pages production STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET to the shown whsec, redeploy main, then resend evt_1TwC0NLA5oeiO5iDUmzugqyy).
